name: V Hook Shower Curtain Rings Brushed Nickel - Threshold™: Zinc Alloy, Nickel-Plated, 12-Pack
description:
The Brushed Nickel Shower Curtain Hooks from Threshold™ are a simple, stylish way to hang your shower curtain. These basic shower hooks come in a contoured ring shape for a secure fit, and the top of each ring is finished with rollers that make it easy to move them along the curtain rod. The brushed nickel finish adds a touch of visual interest, while the straightforward design makes these hooks easy to pair with the shower curtain of your choice.

Threshold™: Quality & Design / Casual classics for house and home.
